frontier.hypothesis: PERM_LINESWAP over the inline block's 6-8 non-CALL statements discovers a schedule-space arrangement outside the s3 hand-swept 13 structural axes and s4-s5 wrap/carrier probes.
frontier.mechanism: PERM_LINESWAP enumerates all dataflow-valid orderings of the specified line block, complementing directed-PERM_GENERAL with systematic O(n!)-minus-invalid coverage.
frontier.next_probe: Permuter modality: add PERM_LINESWAP around the inline block's non-CALL statements in tmp/perm_csmd4/base.c; launch fresh h5-basin campaign with LINESWAP as the only PERM directive; each ordering re-verified against engine sandbox (workspace-permuter UNFAITHFUL caveat per WIP notes) — sub-baseline finds must be splice-verified before promotion.

frontier.hypothesis: decomp.me corpus scrape surfaces a similar-asm scratch whose C shape lies OUTSIDE the h5/g3 basins entirely.
frontier.mechanism: Coarse asm-overlap pre-filter over the downloaded decomp.me corpus (BB2 toolchain class: gcc2.7.2-psx / gcc2.7.2-cdk / psyq3.5); manual inspection of top hits.
frontier.next_probe: Operator installs curl_cffi (source .venv/bin/activate && pip install curl_cffi); next rederive-modality session runs python3 tools/decomp_me_scrape.py search --asm-file asm/funcs/cpu_side_move_dir_4.s and inspects top asm-overlap hits.
